summary: Iteration 25: Enterprise Command Center frontend testing complete. All 13 features tested. 12/13 features working correctly. One minor UI issue found: sidebar toggle button overlapped by fullscreen menu button from PremiumLayout.

ui_bugs.issue: Sidebar toggle button (data-testid='sidebar-toggle-btn') is overlapped by fullscreen menu button (data-testid='fullscreen-menu-btn') from PremiumLayout. Both buttons are positioned in the top-left area. The fullscreen menu button has z-index:1100 and position:fixed at top:16px, left:16px, which intercepts clicks on the sidebar toggle.

issues: Two hamburger menu buttons visible in top-left area - one from EnterpriseCommand (sidebar toggle) and one from PremiumLayout (fullscreen menu). Consider hiding one or repositioning.

passed_tests: TopBar shows 4 KPI cards (Assets actifs: 0, Hors zone: 0, Alertes: 7, Batterie faible: 500) - SUCCESS
Assets sidebar loads and displays assets list with status colors and battery % (500 assets loaded) - SUCCESS
Search input filters assets by name (search 'test' returned 2 assets) - SUCCESS
Status filter chips work correctly (Tous: 500, Actif: 0, Sorti: 29, Inactif: 467, Batt.: 500) - SUCCESS
Clicking an asset opens the Detail Panel with battery gauge, location, info - SUCCESS
Closing the Detail Panel with X button works - SUCCESS
Toggle Routers map control works - SUCCESS
Toggle Zones map control works - SUCCESS
Toggle Timeline map control works and shows timeline panel - SUCCESS
Timeline panel shows recent zone events (3 events displayed) - SUCCESS
Live badge shows WebSocket connection status (visible: true, text: 'Live') - SUCCESS
Map displays with Leaflet tiles correctly - SUCCESS
Notification bell button is clickable and navigates to /alert/index - SUCCESS
Settings button is clickable and navigates to /menu/setup - SUCCESS
Fullscreen mode confirmed - no outer sidebar, fullscreen menu button visible - SUCCESS
action_items: MINOR: Consider repositioning or hiding one of the two hamburger menu buttons in fullscreen mode. The EnterpriseCommand has its own sidebar toggle button, but PremiumLayout also adds a fullscreen menu button that overlaps it.
critical_code_review_comments: EnterpriseCommand.jsx: Well-structured component with all 5 sections (TopBar, Assets Sidebar, Map, Detail Panel, Timeline)
EnterpriseCommand.jsx: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
EnterpriseCommand.jsx: Proper use of Redux for fetching engines/gateways/dashboard data
EnterpriseCommand.jsx: WebSocket integration for real-time updates
EnterpriseCommand.jsx: Leaflet map with clustering working correctly
components.js: Route 'command/center' correctly mapped to EnterpriseCommand
config.js: EXTRA_MENU includes Command Center entry

success_rate.frontend: 92% (12/13 features working, 1 minor UI overlap issue)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data from external API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 tested Enterprise Command Center at /command/center. All major features working: TopBar KPIs, Assets sidebar with search/filters, Map with Leaflet clustering, Detail Panel, Timeline panel, map controls (Routers/Zones/Timeline toggles). Minor UI issue: sidebar toggle button overlapped by fullscreen menu button from PremiumLayout. Key data-testids: enterprise-command, enterprise-topbar, topbar-kpis, kpi-0 to kpi-3, assets-sidebar, assets-search, assets-filters, filter-all/active/exit/nonactive/lowbatt, assets-list, asset-item-{n}, asset-detail-panel, detail-close, enterprise-map, toggle-routers, toggle-zones, toggle-timeline, enterprise-timeline, timeline-event-{n}, sidebar-toggle-btn, ws-live, topbar-notif, topbar-settings, fullscreen-menu-btn.

topbar_kpis.details: 4 KPI cards displayed: Assets actifs, Hors zone, Alertes, Batterie faible

assets_sidebar.details: 500 assets loaded with status colors and battery percentage

search_filter.details: Search 'test' filtered to 2 assets, clearing restored 500

status_filters.details: All 5 filter chips work: Tous(500), Actif(0), Sorti(29), Inactif(467), Batt.(500)

detail_panel.details: Opens on asset click, shows battery gauge, location, info. Close button works.

map_controls.details: Routers, Zones, Timeline toggles all functional

timeline_panel.details: Shows 3 recent zone events with timestamps

sidebar_toggle.details: Works with force=True, but overlapped by fullscreen menu button

leaflet_map.details: Map container and tiles loaded correctly

topbar_buttons.details: Notification and Settings buttons clickable, navigate correctly

fullscreen_mode.details: No outer sidebar, fullscreen menu button visible
